cfg.always_show_xp_bar.name: Always Show XP Bar
cfg.always_show_xp_bar.desc: Display the experience bar constantly, even without active experience gain.
cfg.show_point_gain_above_keeper.name: Show Point Gain Above Keeper
cfg.show_point_gain_above_keeper.desc: Display the points earned above the keeper's head.
cfg.still_play_collect_audio.name: Still Play Collect Audio
cfg.still_play_collect_audio.desc: Keep playing the collect audio when point gain is displayed above the keeper's head.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
